# Quick Gate JS

> Deterministic quality gate CLI for TypeScript and ESLint projects. Runs lint, typecheck, and test gates with structured JSON output. Bounded auto-repair fixes ESLint issues automatically. Produces machine-readable escalation evidence for AI agents. Node 18+, zero config, Apache 2.0.

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/roli-lpci/quick-gate-js/blob/main/README.md): Install, commands, configuration, CI integration, escalation schema
- [CHANGELOG](https://github.com/roli-lpci/quick-gate-js/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): Version history
- [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/roli-lpci/quick-gate-js/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): Development setup, PR guidelines

## Commands

The CLI has three subcommands:
- `quick-gate run` -- Run quality gates (ESLint + TypeScript + tests), output structured JSON
- `quick-gate repair` -- Auto-fix lint failures with bounded retry loop
- `quick-gate summarize` -- Generate agent-readable brief from gate results

## Core Modules

- [CLI](https://github.com/roli-lpci/quick-gate-js/blob/main/src/cli.js): Argument parsing, subcommand dispatch
- [Run Command](https://github.com/roli-lpci/quick-gate-js/blob/main/src/run-command.js): Orchestrates gate execution
- [Repair Command](https://github.com/roli-lpci/quick-gate-js/blob/main/src/repair-command.js): Bounded auto-fix loop
- [Summarize Command](https://github.com/roli-lpci/quick-gate-js/blob/main/src/summarize-command.js): Agent brief generation
- [Gates](https://github.com/roli-lpci/quick-gate-js/blob/main/src/gates.js): Gate implementations (ESLint, TypeScript, test runner)
- [Schema](https://github.com/roli-lpci/quick-gate-js/blob/main/src/schema.js): AJV-based JSON schema validation
- [Model Adapter](https://github.com/roli-lpci/quick-gate-js/blob/main/src/model-adapter.js): LLM model integration for summarize

## Schemas

- [Failures Schema](https://github.com/roli-lpci/quick-gate-js/blob/main/schemas/failures.schema.json): JSON schema for gate failure output
- [Agent Brief Schema](https://github.com/roli-lpci/quick-gate-js/blob/main/schemas/agent-brief.schema.json): JSON schema for summarize output

## GitHub Action

- [Action Definition](https://github.com/roli-lpci/quick-gate-js/blob/main/.github/actions/quick-gate/action.yml): Composite GitHub Action for CI integration
- [Example Workflow](https://github.com/roli-lpci/quick-gate-js/blob/main/.github/workflows/example-usage.yml): Reference CI workflow

## Optional

- [Security Policy](https://github.com/roli-lpci/quick-gate-js/blob/main/SECURITY.md): Vulnerability reporting
